event_info: nicely played; good start from Rickelton; on a good length and at the stumps; no swing for Mukesh either - Rickelton leans across; lets the ball come and then worked it into the gap wide of mid-on for a boundary
good comeback from Mukesh; on a good length and well wide of off; Rickelton leans across and plays away from his body; beaten on the outside edge
fuller length delivery outside off - Rickelton prods across and finds cover with the drive
too straight from Mukesh; on the pads and it's whipped away nonchalantly; places it behind square on the on-side and the ball runs away to the ropes
fuller length delivery outside off - driven to the right of cover-point where Nissanka makes a diving stop. A slight fumble; but they decide against a run

ball_event: on a good length and just outside off - Rickelton leans into the drive and finds the fielder at cover-point
event_info: on a good length and just outside off - Rickelton leans into the drive and finds the fielder at cover-point
edged and four; short of a good length and just outside off - Rohit comes down the pitch; gets a thick edge on the push and finds the gap behind point
extra bounce for Ngidi; surprised Rohit as it climbed onto it - he was staying back and is hit high on the bat
lovely; overpitched and at the pads; Rohit gets inside the line and then whips it behind square on the on-side for a boundary
short of a good length and just outside off - dropped with soft hands towards cover-point for a single
short of a good length and just outside off - Rickelton prods across and defends it to the off-side
the slower ball from Ngidi; drops in front of the left-hander and Rickelton has to check his drive; a soft edge as the ball rolls square on the off-side
short of a good length and well wide of off; Rickelton looks to flat-bat the drive and mistimes it back at the bowler
a swing and a miss; on a good length and angling across the left-hander - Rickelton swipes across the line and misses

ball_event: out Caught by Axar Patel!! This was coming - Rickelton was itching to get away and he's undone by some crafty bowling from Mukesh. On a good length and pushed across the left-hander - Rickelton was looking to swing it over mid-wicket
event_info: the ball catches the outer half and lobs to the right of mid-off. Axar runs across and completes a simple catch. Ryan Rickelton c Axar Patel b Mukesh Kumar 9(11) [4s-2]
fuller length delivery and well wide of off; Tilak shapes for an ambitious drive and gets an inside edge edge - KL moves to his right to make the stop

ball_event: out Caught&Bowled!! Two wickets in the over and Mukesh is on a roll. Was the change of pace that undid Tilak Varma here - slower ball outside off and Tilak was way too early into the drive
event_info: tries to check his shot at the last moment and ends up scooping it to the left of the bowler. Mukesh is on his followthrough; bends low and clasps his hands around it as he fell onto the turf. A safe catch and MI are in early trouble. Tilak Varma c and b Mukesh Kumar 0(2)
nicely played; tad too full and at the pads - Suryakumar leans across.; closes the face of the bat and then clips it past mid-wicket for a boundary
flighted delivery around off; punched down to long-off for a single
tossed up just outside off - driven down to long-off for a single
flighted around off; Rohit prods half-forward in defence
slower and drifting onto the right-hander; Rohit makes room and works it past mid-wicket for a single
flighted delivery outside off - Suryakumar opens himself on the drive; but he can't find the gap past cover
flatter and quicker from Axar - Suryakumar goes back on the whip and gets an inside edge onto his pad
dragged short and down leg; Rohit rocks back on the pull and missed; called as a wide
tossed up on middle and leg; clipped into the gap wide of mid-wicket for a run
flighted delivery on off; punched off the back-foot to mid-off. Rohit Sharma was backing up for a single and is sent back
risky and four; tossed up on middle and leg; was very full as Suryakumar pressed across on the sweep; gets right on top of the bounce and beats backward square leg to his left
good comeback from Vipraj - was the leg-break; drifts in and then spins away; the length drew Suryakumar into the drive and KL was quick to break the stumps; but the MI skipper had gone nowhere
tossed up on off; punched down to long-off for a single
nice bit of flight on off; an open-faced push to backward point
short of a good length and well wide of off; punched square on the off-side for a single
slower ball outside off - Rohit shuffles across on the hack and mistimes it to mid-wicket
the slower yorker now - Rohit watches it closely and defends it back at the bowler
streaky and four; another slower ball; this is a dipping full-toss and it catches the inside half as Rohit slogged; the thick inside edge runs away backward of square on the on-side
creamed; much better from Rohit - a floaty slower ball outside off; he comes down the pitch; meets it on top of the bounce and then finds the gap wide of cover
fuller length delivery outside off - Rohit presses across and finds cover-point with the drive
tossed up on middle and leg; Suryakumar stays leg-sided and then places the drive wide of mid-off - the fielder at long-off gets across and keeps them down to a single
tossed up on middle; punched down to long-on for a single
the leg-break from Vipraj; catches Rohit's edge on the drive and a slight fumble by Mukesh at short third allows a single
Vipraj tosses one well outside off - drilled hard and straight to the fielder at deep cover-point; just a single
nice bit of flight on off; defended back at the bowler
hammered; floaty delivery around off; it's a fraction too full and allows Rohit to get under it; high and over long-on; sails over the ropes for a maximum
beautifully played; tossed up and sliding into the right-hander - Suryakumar shuffles across; gets under it and then sweeps to high over backwards square leg for a maximum
flighted delivery on off; worked down to long-on for a single
pushed through by Axar; Rohit goes back and nudges it to long-on
the slider from Axar; driven with the angle to long-off
Axar tosses one just outside off - Rohit plays with an open face and finds cover-point
slower and just outside off - Rohit backs away and went hard on the drive; no timing and the ball rolls to backward point
tossed up and drifting into the right-hander; whipped through mid-wicket for a single
tossed up just outside off - punched down to long-on for a single
flighted on middle and leg; worked down to long-on
cracking shot; slower and wider of off - Rohit backs away; waits on it and then hammers the drive past cover for a boundary

a big shout for caught behind. KL was convinced; so was Kuldeep. But the umpire isn't so and they've reviewed. Has he gloved the sweep? A definite deflection and UltraEdge says it's come off the pad. They don't need to check for LBW and it's NOT OUT. Rohit seemed to have walked off before coming back; that probably prompted Axar into the review; or they might've been reviewing anyway
flighted delivery on middle and leg; worked off the back-foot to mid-wicket for a single
flighted delivery on middle and leg; tucked wide of mid-wicket for a single
low full-toss outside off; driven square on the off-side for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Nitish Rana!! Slapped and slapped straight to the fielder at cover
event_info: it's Nitish Rana and he doesn't make a mistake. Plucks it out of thin air and sends Rohit on his way - was a tad slower and wider of off; Rohit backed away on the inside out drive and didn't bother to keep it down. No elevation on the shot and Nitish completes a smart catch. Rohit Sharma c Nitish Rana b Axar Patel 35(26) [4s-5 6s-1]
tossed up just outside off - defended to the off-side
flighted delivery outside off - Rutherford stays back and punches it to long-off
tossed up just outside offr; punched square on the off-side for a single
full delivery on leg; swept to short fine leg
85.3kph; full on the stumps; swept to deep midwicket
1 run; 82.2kph; in-drifter; Rutherford misses the glance and the ball rolls to square leg off the pad
slower from Kuldeep; Suryakumar Yadav gets low to sweep and misses to get hit on the back leg. No spin. DC decide against the review. Right call as it pitched outside leg
another sweep attempted; makes contact and sends it along the ground to deep midwicket
full delivery outside off; Rutherford presses forward and lifts it inside-out with the spin over extra cover for a one-bounce four
quicker one on middle-leg. Suryakumar gets low and paddles it fine. Used the bowler's pace and line to his advantage did SKY
86.7kph; length ball on the stumps; flicked through midwicket
90.6kph; quicker one on off; Rutherford defends it towards backward point off the outer part of the bat
googly that spins away a bit; Rutherford is on the back foot to force it through the off-side and gets beaten on the outside edge

ball_event: out Caught by Mukesh Kumar!! In the air ... and ... taken! 94.2kph
event_info: quicker one on a fullish length and Rutherford gets down to slogsweep. More height than distance. Mukesh Kumar moves quickly to his right from deep square leg; he's very close to the boundary and there's a fielder (Kuldeep) converging from deep midwicket as well. Mukesh keeps his eyes on the ball; catches it safely with both hands and then hugs Kuldeep with a bright smile on his face. Replays show that it was a top-spinner from Vipraj. Mukesh was facing the deep midwicket fielder when he reverse-cupped. Sherfane Rutherford c Mukesh Kumar b Vipraj Nigam 5(7) [4s-1]
fullish ball; Naman Dhir drives to long-on
in-dart on leg; Naman Dhir knocks it to long-on
82.3kph; wide down the leg-side on a good length; Suryakumar leaves it alone
clipped through midwicket
stays leg-side and punches this length ball to long-off
84.9kph; Suryakumar Yadav stays back and pushes this in-drifter to cover off the outer part of the bat
very full; Suryakumar gets low; takes it on the full and sweeps square of the man at 45
full on leg; Naman Dhir drives along the ground to long-on. Axar finishes with 1/22 off his 4 overs

Natarajan greeted with a boundary. Slower ball on a short of length; Naman Dhir spots it and slaps it straight down the ground. No chance for long-on to stop that. Flat-batted hit from the right-hander
127.6kph; width on offer; Naman Dhir reaches out and chops it towards point off the under-edge
in the air and safe! 114.5kph; slower ball on a full length outside off. Naman Dhir chips it wide of extra cover and long-off mops it up
slow and short outside off; Naman Dhir tries to ramp it over the vacant slips and misses
126.7kph; in the blockhole and Naman Dhir jams it to long-on
125.3kph; short ball; Suryakumar Yadav hops to straight-pull it to long-on. 100 up for MI with that single
excellent use of the feet! Tossed up delivery; Suryakumar Yadav shimmies down the track; moves leg-side slightly; converts it into a half-volley and tonks it over straight long-on for a towering six
83.6kph; more air; full and wider; SKY reaches out to drive and inside-edges to fine leg. Kuldeep has his hands on head
gets down low to slogsweep and top-edges to deep midwicket. KL Rahul shouts catch it but the ball falls well short of the fielder

that's a superb shot from Naman Dhir! 83.7kph; tossed up and full around off; Naman Dhir makes room; bends his back leg; leans forward and then beautifully lifts it inside-out over deep extra cover. Shot of the day; says Simon Doull on air
flatter and straighter; pulled to deep midwicket
84kph; keeps a bit low does this ball and Suryakumar goes on the back foot to flick it to deep midwicket. 17 runs off the over
slower ball wide of off; SKY slashes and misses. It's outside the tramline
113kph; yorker length; squeezed towards backward point where Kuldeep over-runs and misfields. Just a single though
112.3kph; pace-off; Suryakumar Yadav waits and punches to deep extra cover. Two runs and that brings up SKY's half-century!

ball_event: out Lbw!! Suryakumar Yadav has been adjudged lbw. He has a chat with Naman and reviews. Looked like a pace-off ball from Ngidi on a short of a good length. Bit of low bounce as well and the ball scoots under SKY's bat as he shapes to pull. Gets pinned on the back thigh. UltraEdge confirms no under-edge. Over to ball-tracking and SKY is waiting for it anxiously. Here it is. Three reds and MI lose a review. Fifty and OUT! Ngidi has removed the well-set batter. Suryakumar Yadav lbw b Lungi Ngidi 51(36) [4s-3 6s-2]
event_info: out Lbw!! Suryakumar Yadav has been adjudged lbw. He has a chat with Naman and reviews. Looked like a pace-off ball from Ngidi on a short of a good length. Bit of low bounce as well and the ball scoots under SKY's bat as he shapes to pull. Gets pinned on the back thigh. UltraEdge confirms no under-edge. Over to ball-tracking and SKY is waiting for it anxiously. Here it is. Three reds and MI lose a review. Fifty and OUT! Ngidi has removed the well-set batter. Suryakumar Yadav lbw b Lungi Ngidi 51(36) [4s-3 6s-2]
fullish ball on the stumps; Mitchell Santner defends it into the off-side
round the wicket; slower ball on a length; Santner taps it in front of backward point for a quick single
low dipping full toss; Naman Dhir spots it late and can only knock it down to long-on for a single. Good over for DC; just 7 runs plus SKY's wicket
over the wicket; very full on off; driven to long-off
low full toss and Santner chips it over the bowler. Stubbs moves to his left from long-off and takes it on the bounce
slow and into the deck; Naman Dhir spots it. Waits for it pulls uppishly through square leg
bouncer; pulled to deep midwicket after a mini-hop from Naman Dhir
just wide of the diving backward point fielder! Slow and short outside off; Santner makes room; hops and cuts it past a leaping Kuldeep
short and on the stumps now; pulled to deep midwicket
yorker length; Santner jams it towards the mid-on region. Just a single as Ngidi gets to the ball
slow; full and outside off; driven along the ground to long-off
low full toss just outside off; just a single again even as Santner goes hard on the drive. Rolls along the carpet to long-off
a belated lbw appeal from Ngidi. DC decide against the review. Pace-on; yorker length angling in; Naman Dhir looks to flick and inside-edges onto his pad
slow; full and outside off; Naman Dhir reaches out and dinks it to long-off

128.8kph; Ngidi doesn't nail the yorker. Low full toss; Santner manages to get under it and gets enough wood to lift it over extra cover. Boundary off the last ball. Ngidi finishes with 1/34 off his 4 overs
in the blockhole; Naman Dhir squeezes it back to the bowler
132kph; another yorker; jammed down to long-off
123.3kph; slower ball into the deck; Santner miscues the pull and deep midwicket takes it on the bounce

ball_event: out Caught by Tristan Stubbs!! Holes out now! Naman Dhir stands tall
event_info: picks the length (short) and shapes to pull. Strikes hard and makes decent contact. But it's the longer side and he's hit it straight down Stubbs' throat at deep midwicket. It was the slower ball bouncer from Natarajan. Naman Dhir c Tristan Stubbs b Natarajan 28(21) [4s-2 6s-1]
low full toss; pushed towards mid-off for a quick single
slow and short; a swivelling Santner pulls to deep backward square leg off the inner part of the bat. Excellent over from Natarajan

slower ball into the deck outside off. Santner hops and slashes; misses. Wided by the umpire. KL Rahul asks if that could be reviewed; Mukesh isn't too interested. But Axar; nevertheless; sends it upstairs. There is some part of the ball inside the wide guideline. Virender Sharma wants to check the height as well. It's below the head and hence a successful review. DOT
132.8kph; short of a good length; Santner swings hard and splices it over extra cover
slow and short outside off; Santner hops to try and cut it over backward point. Can't reach for it and that's been wided. Well outside off on this occasion
123.2kph; slow again into the deck; Santner pulls off the inner half of the bat to deep midwicket
134.6kph; full on off; Bosch swings it through midwicket off the inner part of the bat
117kph; slow; short of length outside off; Corbin Bosch stands tall and slaps it through extra cover
back-to-back fours to end the innings. Full delivery angling in; Bosch flicks through square leg. Nitish Rana slides in the deep but fumbles and that results in a boundary
pitched up on middle; KL gets his left leg out of the way and drives it to mid-off; he's off for a quick single
fuller length delivery on the pads; whipped backward of square on the on-side for a single
Chahar shortens the length outside off - punched off the back-foot to cover-point

ball_event: out Caught by Ryan Rickelton!! KL has been strangled down leg and MI have an early wicket - fuller length delivery and angling down leg
event_info: KL was shuffling across on the flick and gets a thin inside edge. Ryan Rickelton moves quickly to his left and then dives to complete the catch - KL knew he had edged it and he's off as soon as Kumar Dharmasena lifted the finger. DC off to a poor start once again. Rahul c Ryan Rickelton b Deepak Chahar 1(3)
the big inswinger from Chahar - nips back into the left-hander and catches Nitish in the crease; thuds into the pad and in front of leg-stump
the awayswinger now; curves away from the left-hander - Nitish gets right behind the line in defence
fuller length delivery outside off - Nissanka leans into the drive and finds mid-off
cracking shot; fuller length delivery and well wide of off; Nissanka saw the width and threw his hands on the drive; struck fiercely and flies past the fielder at cover for a boundary
Bumrah drags the length back on middle; pulled past square leg for a single

ball_event: out Nitish Rana Run Out!! A run-out at the bowler's end and Nitish Rana is run-out - Early strife once again for the Capitals. Was the slower ball around off and Nitish dropped it in front of mid-wicket - he set-off and so did his partner
event_info: but then Nitish stuttered. Too late as Pathum Nissanka was a long way down the pitch. Bumrah moves to his left; collects the ball and then throws down the stumps at the bowler's end; all in one action. Nitish was so short of his ground despite the dive and I don't think the stutter would have hardly mattered. Nitish Rana run out (Jasprit Bumrah) 0(3)
on a good length and just outside off - Nissanka plays with a closed bat-face and turns it to the on-side
short of a good length and angling back into the right-hander - a straight-batted punch; but Tilak dives to his left at mid-wicket to cut-off a certain boundary
fuller length delivery outside off - driven hard and straight to the fielder at mid-off
yorker length delivery on the leg-stump line - Nissanka watches it all along; jams the bat down and squeezes it to the off-side
easy pickings for Nissanka - short and down leg; Nissanka swivels across and helps it on its way with the pull; bounces away to the ropes

a chance and Chahar has put it down; was hit very hard and have to think it's only half-chance at best. Was a back of a length delivery on off and Nissanka smashed it back at the bowler after giving the charge. Stung Deepak Chahar's hands even before he could react
Nissanka is looking to be positive; backs away to a full ball and chips it back over the bowler's head; no timing and the ball drops widfe of Santner at mid-off

on a good length and at the stumps; driven straight to the fielder at mid-on. Thakur collects and then throws it back towards the keeper. No one was alert though and the ball rolled away to the ropes. But the over had been called by then and it's considered as a dead ball
flatter and quicker from Santner - Nissanka backs away and gets an inside edge on the flick; runs away fine and gives the chasing fielder at short fine no chance
back-to-back boundaries for Nissanka; brings out the reverse sweep now - Santner saw it and dragged it down leg; but the right-hander reaches out and places it wide of point
Santner tosses one slower and just outside off - a wild hack from Nissanka; no timing and the ball drops at his feet
Santner slows down the pace and goes wider of off; another miscued shot as Nissanka shaped to sweep; drags an under-edge past mid-wicket
flighted delivery on off; punched down to long-off for a single
very full and on off; Nissanka gets his bat down and jams it back at the bowler
short of a good length and at the stumps - Rizvi walks down the pitch and is slightly cramped for room; manages an under-edge on the dab and the ball rolls to the off-side
massive; fraction short and Nissanka is all over it like a rash; picks the length; swivels across and then bludgeons the pull over deep square leg
thumped; full and just outside off - Nissanka gets right under it and then hammers it back over the bowler's head; one bounce and over the ropes
the slower bouncer from Shardul - Nissanka swivels across on the pull and misses; bounces through to Ryan Rickelton and it's one for the over
smashed; Nissanka is on a roll now - runs down the pitch; makes room and then lashes the drive over mid-off; one bounce and over the ropes
good comeback from Shardul - yorker on middle and Nissanka squeezes it in front of point; off for a quick single and it's 16 off the over
slower short ball outside off - Nissanka was looking to pull and is through with the shot early; catches the toe-end and rolls to the off-side
slower ball outside off - heaved away past square leg for a single
another slower ball outside off - Rizvi is early into the push and the ball rolls back off the inner half to the bowler
full and on off; driven in front of mid-off for a single
fuller length delivery outside off; driven to the left of mid-off for a single
the slower off-cutter from Bumrah; nips back into the right-hander and catches high off Rizvi's bat; bounces down to short third
flighted delivery on off; driven to the right of cover - a half-stop and they're off for a single
flatter and at the stumps; Sameer Rizvi was through the shot early and missed; gets struck high on the body. A brief appeal from Santner; but he himself knew it was high
pushed through quicker and drifting back into the right-hander - Rizvi backed away with an open stance on the pull and missed; through his leg and to the keeper
lovely; tossed up by Santner and Rizvi is onto it in a flash; gets a good stride forward and then lifts it back over the bowler's head; one bounce and over the ropes
appeal for a caught behind; but Kumar Dharmasena shakes his head; flatter and drifting down leg; Rizvi was shaping for the pull and missed; might've brushed his trouser on its way to the keeper
1 run; flighted delivery down leg; Rizvi was shaping to pull and missed; bounces off the thigh-pad and rolls behind square on the on-side
a half-chance; but the ball was past him even before he could react. Was it just outside off; Rizvi came down the pitch and drilled the drive high and to Markande's left
the wrong 'un; spins into the pads and it's flicked behind square on the on-side
pushed through by Markande; but it's down leg and is called as a wide
loopy delivery wide of off - Rizvi went hard on the drive and mistimed it to cover
Markande tosses one just outside off - punched down to long-off for a single
the wrong 'un; spins into the pads and it's worked through mid-wicket for a single
pushed through flatter and quicker; Rizvi came down the pitch and the ball caught the inside edge; rolls behind square on the on-side for a run
a miscued pull and Rizvi gets away; short of a good length and into the pitch; cranmped the right-hander for room and hit high on the bat; lobbed over mid-wicket

a chance and Naman Dhir can't hold on; ran in from deep backward square leg; got both hands and couldn't hang on. Was a length ball around middle; Nissanka shuffled across; got inside the line and then whipped it over backward square leg. Having done all the hard yards; Dhir would be disappointed at not taking it
fuller length delivery and well down leg; called as a wide

whipped; he's someone special; might struggle but then brings out such audacious shots - fuller length delivery on the pads and he lets his wrists take over; whips it powerfully over square leg for a maximum
on a good length and at the stumps; worked wide of mid-wicket for a single
fuller length delivery outside off - punched towards mid-off for a single
fuller length delivery outside off - Rizvi plays with an open face and carves it square on the off-side. 12 off the over
lovely shot; fraction short and wide of off - Rizvi backs away; plays late and then cuts it square past point; runs away to the ropes in a hurry
flighted delivery outside off; driven down to long-off for a single
tossed up slower and wider of off - swept hard and in front of square on the on-side. Tilak sprints to his right at deep mid-wicket; dives and keeps them down to a single
tossed up on middle; worked through mid-wicket for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Mayank Markande!! A top-edge on the pull and this is a big wicket for the Mumbai Indians. Was pshed through flatter and Nissanka is late on the shot
event_info: he's through with the swivel; the ball catches the top-edge and loops over the keeper's head. Markande runs to his right at short fine; slides and completes a fine catch. End of a fine innings from Nissanka though. Pathum Nissanka c Mayank Markande b Mitchell Santner 44(30) [4s-6 6s-1]
tossed up just outside off - Miller leans across defensively
width on offer; Sameer Rizvi cuts and finds backward point
125kph; pitched up delivery outside off; slower one as well. Rizvi walks across; gets under it and biffs it over mid-off
dug in short by Bosch; Rizvi crouches low and smartly periscopes it over the keeper's head. Uses the bowler's bounce to his advantage. Back-to-back fours
Rizvi shapes to pull and gets beaten on the under-edge
width on offer; quick hands from Sameer Rizvi who flashes hard to slap it over deep backward point. Terrific shot

Sameer Rizvi continues to go after Bosch. 135.9kph; fuller than a good length; Rizvi shuffles a bit and hits it downtown. Swings hard. Doesn't quite middle it but he's muscled it for a maximum. 20 runs off the over
leg-lined; worked through midwicket
quicker one; Sameer Rizvi goes on the back foot to flick and misses
back-to-back fifties for Sameer Rizvi! He gets there in style. Fullish ball; Rizvi comes down the track; moves leg-side in the process and smokes it over wide long-off. Superb hitting
six more! Rizvi steps out of the crease again; doesn't allow the ball to spin and bludgeons it downtown. He's putting on a show here
stabbed to extra cover
width on offer; cut to deep point. 14 runs off the over
slower ball outside off; Sameer Rizvi looks to drill it through the covers. Gets a faint outside edge that dribbles to the keeper
113.8kph; pace off again; on a good length; Rizvi waits and dabs it to short third man

129.7kph; Bumrah appeals for lbw; the umpire shakes his head. MI ponder and decide against the review. Full and angling in; Rizvi looks to flick and gets an inside edge onto his pad. Ryan Rickelton has a shy at the stumps and misses. Rizvi was in trouble there
cutter from Bumrah and Miller doesn't pick it. Pushes defensively to cover off the outside-edge
slower ball; keeps low as well; Miller is early to pull and misses. The ball scoots under the blade
126.3kph; short of length outside off; Miller guides it to backward point. Just 1 run off the over
Sameer Rizvi greets Chahar with a boundary. Width on offer; knuckle ball. Rizvi waits and slaps the cut through extra cover
no room on this occasion. It's the cutter into the deck and Sameer Rizvi arches back to guide it backward of square on the off-side. Misses and gets hit on the arm/shoulder
low full toss and dispatched. The line is down leg; so Rizvi walks across and brings his bottom hand into play to whip it over deep backward square leg

slower ball; the line is down leg once again; Rizvi swivels and pulls it square of the man at 45. Santner runs to his right in the deep and makes a diving stop. Santner is in a bit of pain; holds his right shoulder
slower ball bouncer; Rizvi waits and waits to try and upper-cut; misses
116.3kph; pace off and on a short of length; worked into the midwicket pocket and Rizvi will keep the strike
slow; short and wide of off. Sameer Rizvi stands tall; waits for it and flays it over backward point. One bounce and into the fence
slower ball on a short of length; Rizvi walks across to try and flick it towards fine leg. Gets an inside edge onto his body
118.7kph; off-speed length ball; pushed to cover

the boundaries keep coming from Rizvi's bat! Thakur goes full and overpitches. Rizvi stays back; clears his front leg and drills it to the left of mid-off. Bullets away to the fence and Rizvi moves into the 80s with that boundary
120.2kph; slow; short and too wide outside off; left alone
118.8kph; pace off into the deck outside off; Rizvi tries to glide it to third man and misses

128.7kph; Shardul Thakur pulls his length back as he bowls the off-cutter. Sameer Rizvi spots it. Hangs back; clears his front leg and slams it over deep extra cover. Seventh six for Rizvi as he moves to 87
slow and full; eased through wide mid-off

slow ball on a short of length; Sameer Rizvi late-dabs to the left of short third man where Shardul does well to stop with his outstretched left hand. Rizvi is ball-watching and David Miller forces him to take the single
130.2kph; first boundary for David Miller. On a length and outside off; Miller presses forward and drives hard uppishly through the covers

the slower bouncer and it goes well over Miller's head. Rickelton isn't impressed; but Bumrah coaxes Suryakumar into a review. It's comfortably sailing over Miller's head though and the wide call stays. MI lose a review
131.1kph; low full toss on leg and Miller flicks it away through midwicket. Beats the diving midwicket fielder to his left and the ball is quick to reach the fence
118.1kph; slower ball on a full length and that's been blunted into the leg-side
118.6kph; slower ball on a good length; Miller is happy to defend it back to the bowler. Another wicketless outing for Bumrah who finishes with 0/21 off his 4 overs
very full and Sameer Rizvi drags it through midwicket as he swings across the line

ball_event: out Caught by Tilak Varma!! The fun ends. But Sameer Rizvi has played a blinder. David Miller gives him a pat on the back
event_info: so does Ryan Rickelton. He's distraught but he gets a superb ovation from the Delhi crowd. His team-mates in the dug-out stand and applaud. Full delivery; Rizvi clears his front leg to loft it downtown. The bat turns at the point of impact and he ends up slicing it a long way up in the air. Tilak comes in from long-off to take the catch. Sameer Rizvi c Tilak Varma b Corbin Bosch 90(51) [4s-7 6s-7]
full delivery; eased towards long-off
full on the pads; Stubbs flicks. It's probably off the pad and a diving Rickelton deflects it towards the short fine leg fielder
overpitched delivery outside off; Miller leans forward and drives to extra cover
very full on the pads; Miller flicks and misses
low full toss; knocked down to long-on
full toss; Miller heaves it powerfully and beats the diving long-on fielder to his left
low full toss; driven along the ground to long-off
another full toss; Stubbs knocks it to long-on
very full outside off; squeeze-driven to the right of long-off. Two is the call but the batters settle for a single
full ball angling in; clipped to midwicket
full toss down the leg-side and Miller flicks it fine of the man at 45. Delhi Capitals win by 6 wickets with 11 balls to spare
